intro: Global organizations faced a concentrated wave of WordPress security incidents between April 13 and 17, 2026, as documented in five recent reports. The activity included two critical and three high-severity vulnerabilities, with the specific flaw CVE-2026-1492 highlighted among them. The targeting was broad, with a global scope of affected regions. This series of reports underscores the ongoing and focused attention threat actors are directing at this ubiquitous content management system.
